description: Complete inventory of all UI text, buttons, labels, placeholders, and styling options across the storefront

status.configurable: Text/styling is configurable via storefront-control CMS

defaults.noOrdersMessage: When you place an order, it will appear here
defaults.noOrdersYetMessage: Looks like you haven't placed any orders yet. Start shopping to see your orders here!

uiElements.note: Feature flag, button text is hardcoded
Feature flag, button text is hardcoded

cart: Quantity input labels (no visible labels, just input controls)
wishlist: Header item count text format (calculated: {count} item{plural})
hardcodedElements.note: All text elements are now configurable except icon-only buttons and calculated/formatted text

notes: All UI text is now configurable via storefront-control CMS
Remaining hardcoded elements are icon-only buttons or calculated/formatted text
All styling (colors, fonts, borders, font sizes) is configurable
Button styles are fully configurable per variant
Badge styles are fully configurable per type
Font sizes are configurable for all text elements (h1-h4, body, small, button, caption)
RTL/LTR support is built-in with logical properties and direction-aware alignment
Field naming is consistent across schema, types, sample config, and inventory (camelCase)

intentionalDuplicates.note: Some field names appear in multiple schemas but are properly scoped by context
examples: searchPlaceholder: general (newsletter), filters (product search), navbar (header search)

error.description: Error page shown when application errors occur

uiElements.default: We're sorry, but something unexpected happened. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

notFound.description: 404 page shown when a page is not found

uiElements.default: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved or doesn't exist.
